title: goodenia xanthotricha
intro: Goodenia xanthotricha, also known as Yellowish-green Goodenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. Native to Australia, Goodenia xanthotricha has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, as well as the potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Goodenia xanthotricha can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support respiratory health and overall well-being.
